title: pycreus sanguinolentus subsp. micronux
intro: Pycreus sanguinolentus subsp. micronux, also known as the red bog-rush, is a plant species belonging to the Cyperaceae family. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of Pycreus sanguinolentus subsp. micronux are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
